sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_divideDecimal (id UInt32, a Decimal64(2), b Decimal64(2));
INSERT INTO test_divideDecimal VALUES (1, toDecimal64(10.50, 2), toDecimal64(2.00, 2));
UPDATE test_divideDecimal SET b = toDecimal64(3.00, 2) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, a, b, divideDecimal(a, b, 2) AS result FROM test_divideDecimal;
SELECT id, divideDecimal(a, b, 3) AS result_precision FROM test_divideDecimal WHERE b <> 0;
